events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, the legendary guitarist for Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! His iconic guitar work with Queen shaped generations of rock. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the incomparable Sir Mick Jagger – what's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. And the first video ever played? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – how ironic! What was your favourite MTV moment?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and vital today. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock! Three days of peace, love, and iconic performances that defined a generation. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since the King of Rock and Roll left us. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever. What's your top Jimi track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your favourite moment from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the legendary frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still commanding the stage with The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a celebrated solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those vocals. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, we celebrate 55 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released. A powerful message that resonates as strongly today as it did then. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: Music in your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple dropped a game-changer that put a thousand songs in your pocket. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, 007 has been thrilling us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's the Lennon lyric that stays with you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us endless laughs. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but commonly known as the 'White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed the sprawling, brilliant 'White Album'. A double LP packed with diverse genius. What's your hidden gem from this iconic record?
